---
title: "Research"
---

## Working Papers

### Leaders and the Direction of Science: Evidence from University Presidents (Solo, JMP)
**Abstract:** Brief description of the paper and its findings.

[Paper](papers/paper1.pdf) | [Slides](slides/paper1_slides.pdf) | [Code](https://github.com/zerin5577/paper1)

---

### Paper Title 2
**Abstract:** Brief description of the paper and its findings.

[Paper](papers/paper2.pdf) | [Slides](slides/paper2_slides.pdf)

---

## Work in Progress

- **Innovation in India (with Christian Fons-Rosen) ** - Brief description
- **Lost Science** - Brief description

## Publications

*Coming soon*
